generated_oml:
instance SwingAngleEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Measures hoist swinging motion for gantry crane"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SwingAngleDataTransmitted
]

instance Anemometer : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Measures wind speed for gantry crane"
    DTDFVocab:producedData AnemometerDataTransmitted
]

instance CartMotorController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "TMC4671-Eval motor controller for cart movement"
]

instance HoistMotorController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "TMC4671-Eval motor controller for hoist movement"
]

instance Electromagnet : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Electromagnet at hoist end for container pickup"
]

instance CraneFrame : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Structural frame of the lab-scale gantry crane"
]

instance ArduinoController : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Arduino microcontroller processing sensor data"
]

instance SwingAngleDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SwingAngleEncoder
]

instance AnemometerDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom Anemometer
]

instance SwingAngleData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Swing angle measurement data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SwingAngleDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDB
]

instance AnemometerData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Wind speed measurement data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData AnemometerDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDB
]

instance Docker : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Containerization platform for all digital twin components"
    DTDFVocab:enables TrajectoryGeneratorService, SimulationService, ContinuousValidationService, HistoricalDataLoggingService, DashboardService, MQTTBroker, TimescaleDB
]

instance TimescaleDB : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Time-series database for storing crane operational data"
    DTDFVocab:enables HistoricalDataLoggingService, DashboardService, ContinuousValidationService
]

instance MQTTBroker : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Mosquitto MQTT broker for real-time data streaming"
    DTDFVocab:enables HistoricalDataLoggingService
]

instance Grafana : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Visualization tool for real-time data dashboard"
    DTDFVocab:enables DashboardService
]

instance AutodeskFusion360 : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "CAD software for gantry crane model design"
    DTDFVocab:enables CADModel
]

instance Capella : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Model-based systems engineering tool using Arcadia method"
    DTDFVocab:enables ArcadiaModel
]

instance PythonGantrylib : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python module for controlling physical crane components"
    DTDFVocab:enables PhysicalCraneInterfaceService
]

instance CADModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Autodesk Fusion 360 CAD model of gantry crane structure"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo AutodeskFusion360
]

instance KinematicModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Kinematic model for optimal trajectory generation"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TrajectoryGeneratorService
]

instance CraneDynamicsSimulationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulation model of crane dynamics for real-time simulation"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulationService
]

instance ArcadiaModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Arcadia model for MBSE of gantry crane system"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo Capella
]

instance TrajectoryGeneratorService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Generates optimal trajectories using kinematic model"
    DTDFVocab:provides OptimalTrajectoryInsight
]

instance SimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Simulates crane dynamics in real-time"
    DTDFVocab:provides SimulationResultsInsight
]

instance ContinuousValidationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Compares real-time measurements against simulations for validation"
    DTDFVocab:provides ValidationAlertAction
]

instance HistoricalDataLoggingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Logs sensor data to TimescaleDB via MQTT"
    DTDFVocab:provides HistoricalDataStorageInsight
]

instance DashboardService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Grafana-based dashboard for trajectory traces and confidence bounds"
    DTDFVocab:provides TrajectoryTracesInsight, SimulationConfidenceBoundsInsight
]

instance PhysicalCraneInterfaceService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Python-based interface controlling cart, hoist motors, and electromagnet"
    DTDFVocab:provides ActuationControlAction
]

instance OptimalTrajectoryInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Optimal trajectory path for crane movement"
]

instance SimulationResultsInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time simulation results of crane dynamics"
]

instance HistoricalDataStorageInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Stored historical data for analysis"
]

instance TrajectoryTracesInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time trajectory traces with simulation confidence bounds"
]

instance SimulationConfidenceBoundsInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Confidence bounds for simulation results"
]

instance ValidationAlertAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Triggers operator alerts when validation thresholds are breached"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance ActuationControlAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Control signals for cart, hoist motors, and electromagnet"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance GantryCraneEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Lab-scale gantry crane system inspired by harbor cranes in Antwerp"
    base:contains CraneFrame, CartMotorController, HoistMotorController, Electromagnet, SwingAngleEncoder, Anemometer, ArduinoController, TrajectoryGeneratorService, SimulationService, ContinuousValidationService, HistoricalDataLoggingService, DashboardService, MQTTBroker, TimescaleDB, Docker, AutodeskFusion360, Capella, PythonGantrylib, CADModel, KinematicModel, CraneDynamicsSimulationModel, ArcadiaModel, SwingAngleData, AnemometerData, SwingAngleDataTransmitted, AnemometerDataTransmitted, OptimalTrajectoryInsight, SimulationResultsInsight, ValidationAlertAction, HistoricalDataStorageInsight, TrajectoryTracesInsight, SimulationConfidenceBoundsInsight, ActuationControlAction
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Optimal trajectory commands generated by the Trajectory Generator Service are transmitted through the Physical Crane Interface to control motor controllers and electromagnet movements, enabling precise physical actuation."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Continuous real-time synchronization with data logged and validated at operational speeds, where trajectory execution and simulation comparisons occur instantaneously during crane operation."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Centralized system where physical crane hardware interfaces with Python-based control applications, and digital services (Docker containers) handle data flow, simulation, validation, and visualization, all hosted on a single PC."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "As operated (real-time monitoring and validation of physical crane during operational use, including fault detection and trajectory execution in live scenarios)."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Continuous validation service calculates distance metrics between real trajectory measurements and simulated trajectories, comparing against predefined thresholds to ensure model accuracy and detect discrepancies."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol (Eclipse Mosquitto) for inter-service communication; Python-based Physical Crane Interface for hardware control, with data flows between sensors, controllers, and digital services via MQTT topics."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "All services deployed on a single personal computer using Docker containers for Database, MQTT Broker, and Dashboard, with gantrylib Python module for core logic and a single docker-compose command for setup."
]
